headline: eToro launches Tori AI companion and Alpha Portfolios — AI-driven social investing goes mainstream
summary: eToro introduced Tori, an AI-powered companion that guides users through market volatility, explains portfolio performance in plain language, and surfaces relevant community insights from eToro's social trading network. Alongside Tori, eToro launched Alpha Portfolios — seven AI-driven investment strategies that continuously rebalance based on market signals and user risk preferences. With $31B in assets under management, eToro is merging social trading with AI-driven portfolio management to retain retail investors who might otherwise migrate to robo-advisors.

verified_claims: eToro introduced an AI-powered companion named Tori (implied by headline 'eToro Leverages AI to Redefine Social Investing')
eToro is associated with social investing/social trading (supported by article title)

Tori explains portfolio performance in plain language
Tori surfaces relevant community insights from eToro's social trading network
Alpha Portfolios consist of seven AI-driven investment strategies
Alpha Portfolios continuously rebalance based on market signals and user risk preferences

_governance.notes: The source article content is almost entirely navigation/boilerplate from GlobeNewswire and does not include the actual article body. Only the headline 'eToro Leverages AI to Redefine Social Investing' is visible. None of the specific claims — Tori's features, Alpha Portfolios, the count of seven strategies, the $31B AUM figure, or the strategic rationale — can be verified against the source. The paywall or truncation prevents access to the article content.
